text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 211 

LIMITED_GAP_BENEFIT_AMT 

LABEL: Limited Gap Coverage Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the dollar amount of the limited gap benefits offered by the Part D plan. This 
limited benefit is not considered Gap Coverage. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: LIMITED_GAP_BENEFIT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable is only
